title: parse: default `.containerignore` and `.dockerignore` must not point to symlink outside context
body:
Drop support for use-case when .containerignore or .dockerignore is a symlink pointing to arbitrary location on host.

Buildah implementation of: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/16315

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]
[NO TESTS NEEDED]


```release-note
build: drop support for use-case when .containerignore or .dockerignore is a symlink pointing to arbitrary location on host.
```
